untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'unusually tall candlestick' and 'overhead resistance' (rising/falling windows, congestion areas) which are not directly available as indicators. The 'range > atr_14' approximates tall candle detection, but precise pattern recognition for window/congestion identification requires custom pattern logic not available in allowed indicators. Pivot levels (r1) used as proxy for overhead resistance.
translation_notes: Interpreted 'established uptrend' as close > sma_20. 'Unusually tall candlestick' approximated using range > atr_14 (candle range exceeds average volatility). Overhead resistance proxied with close < r1 (first resistance level). Exit condition set to close > prev_high (candle closes above tall candle's high, invalidating reversal). Source performance data (67% success rate) noted but not directly encodable in rule format. Pattern requires manual validation of congestion areas and window formations.
